column3: First newborn check, day of birth
column7: Delivered Willow Creek, discharged same day, Apgar 9 at 1 min 9 at 5 min
Mild jaundice, bilirubin 11.2, watch and feed. Resolved by next visit.
Jaundice cleared. Gaining well. Breastfeeding established.
Vaccines: HepB 2, DTaP 1, Hib 1, IPV 1, PCV 1, RV 1. Fussy 48 hours, resolved.
Vaccines: DTaP 2, Hib 2, IPV 2, PCV 2, RV 2. Rolling front to back. Good eye contact.
Vaccines: DTaP 3, Hib 3, PCV 3, RV 3. Starting solids. Tries everything. Good eater.
Pulling to stand. Two teeth. Says mama and dada. No concerns.
Vaccines: DTaP 4, Hib 4, PCV 4, MMR 1, Varicella 1, HepA 1. Walking with support. Great.
Walking well. 10 to 15 words. Appetite selective but adequate. Normal for age.
Vaccine: HepA 2. Running everywhere. Parallel play. No stranger anxiety.
Two-word phrases. Knows colors. Toilet training conversation: not ready yet, monitor.
Left otitis media. Amoxicillin 400 mg twice daily x 10 days. Resolved at follow-up.
Ear clear. No recurrence. No tubes needed at this time. Monitor.
Good language. 3-word sentences, some 4. Active toilet training. Mild separation anxiety.
Influenza vaccine given. No adverse reaction.
Viral URI, no bacterial signs. Rest, fluids, fever management. Resolved in 5 days.
Vaccines: none due. Language on track, 4-word sentences. Toilet training progress good.

column6: Dr. Yoon notes: Owen is healthy and developing normally. Continue toilet training positively.
No referrals. Next visit 4-year well check (November 2026 or sooner if needed).
